    "Coupling gap is out of specification during active shaft alignment",
    "Sequence violation: proceeding with final alignment before establishing correct axial spacing and checking for soft foot"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the alignment process immediately",
    "Loosen the machine hold-down bolts and adjust the axial spacing to meet the OEM coupling gap specification",
    "Perform a soft foot check and correct any soft foot before proceeding with final laser alignment"
  ],
  "rationale": "The coupling gap must be set to the OEM specified nominal distance (axial spacing) and soft foot must be eliminated before final horizontal and vertical laser alignment can be completed. Proceeding with an out-of-spec coupling gap violates API 686 installation standards and will cause premature coupling wear or thrust bearing damage.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 Chapter 6 (Machinery Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Manual (Pre-alignment Checklist)"
  ]
